anti_claim: Organ registry rows are public runtime authority metadata and receipt inventory only; accepted_current_authority status, organ counts, adapter-backed counts, and generated receipt counts do not create score-based progress, release, product completeness, private-root equivalence, source mutation, proof correctness, whole-system correctness, provider-call, secret-export, or trading/financial-advice authority.

authority_ceiling.reader_action: Use implemented_organs to find current public runtime targets, runner commands, and receipt refs; do not treat accepted_current_authority, organ counts, adapter-backed counts, or generated receipt counts as product progress, release readiness, proof correctness, private-root equivalence, or whole-system authority.
overread_guard: accepted_current_authority names current public receipts only; it is not product progress, release readiness, proof correctness, or source authority above macro contracts
organ counts and adapter-backed counts are inventory fields, not maturity, completeness, benchmark, or launch gates
generated_receipt_count points to public-relative receipt files only; it is not proof authority, private-root equivalence, or complete secret detection

Every accepted organ row carries evidence_class, evidence_strength_rank, claim_ceiling, truth_accounting_bucket, and counts_as_real_substrate_progress; read status through those fields before inferring evidence strength.
registry_can_claim: which public target organs have current-authority acceptance receipts
which commands regenerate their public receipts
which generated receipts are public-relative and body-redacted
that a bounded public Lean/Lake witness compiled in a temporary workspace
registry_cannot_claim: Lean/Lake proof authority beyond the bounded witness
macro source authority above current reconstruction receipts
uniform accepted_current_authority without per-organ evidence strength

evidence_class_registry.reader_action: Read accepted_current_authority together with each row evidence_class, claim_ceiling, and truth_accounting_bucket; status alone is receipt inventory, not evidence strength.
